critical-reference.note: ⚠️ SOURCE OF TRUTH: docs/ux-space-grid-v2.html contains the authoritative theme definitions

existing-files.file: // src/components/theme-toggle.tsx "use client" import * as React from "react" import { Moon, Sun } from "lucide-react" import { useTheme } from "next-themes" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger, } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu" export function ThemeToggle() { const { setTheme, theme } = useTheme() return ( setTheme("light")}>Light setTheme("dark")}>Dark setTheme("system")}>System ) } Replace this with ThemeSwitcher that shows VO themes (neon, zen, obsidian, paper)

package.name: next-themes
package.note: Already installed - provides useTheme hook, ThemeProvider, system preference detection

package.name: @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu
package.note: Already installed - use for ThemeSwitcher dropdown

package.name: lucide-react
package.note: Already installed - use for theme icons (Palette, Sun, Moon, etc.)

step.description: Create theme CSS with tokens from ux-space-grid-v2.html

key-decisions.decision: Use [data-theme="X"] selectors to match next-themes attribute
Map --vo-* tokens to shadcn --background, --foreground, etc. for compatibility
Use CSS-only ambient mesh (no JS) with display:none for themes without gradient

files-to-modify.file: src/providers/theme-provider.tsx - add themes array, change attribute to data-theme

step.description: Create useVOTheme hook for type-safe theme access
Create visual theme switcher with color swatches
step.design-spec: - Dropdown trigger: Palette icon (from lucide-react) - Menu items: Theme name + color swatch preview - Swatches show: bg-color, accent-color, text-color as small circles - Active theme has checkmark - Keyboard accessible: arrow keys, Enter, Escape - Screen reader: announces "Theme: [name] selected"

step.description: Replace ThemeToggle with ThemeSwitcher in dashboard header
Persist theme to Supabase for authenticated users
step.logic: 1. On mount: if user logged in, fetch preferences.theme from profile 2. Apply fetched theme if exists, else use localStorage/system 3. On theme change: debounce (500ms) and PATCH to API 4. Fallback: localStorage for unauthenticated users

test.item: All 4 themes render correctly with expected colors
Neon theme shows ambient mesh gradient animation
Obsidian/Paper themes have no mesh gradient
shadcn components (Button, Card, Dialog) inherit theme colors
Theme syncs to Supabase for logged-in users
Contrast ratios meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 text)
